classes.name: Organisation
classes.label: Organisation
classes.description: A group of people who work together in an organized way for a shared purpose.

classes.name: Country
classes.label: Country
classes.description: A nation with its own government, occupying a particular territory.

classes.name: NuclearFacility
classes.label: Nuclear Facility
classes.description: A facility involved in the production or processing of nuclear materials.

classes.name: NewsAgency
classes.label: News Agency
classes.description: An organization that gathers and distributes news to other media outlets.

classes.name: MilitaryOrganisation
classes.label: Military Organisation
classes.description: An organization belonging to a country's armed forces.

classes.name: Convoy
classes.label: Convoy
classes.description: A group of vehicles or ships traveling together.

classes.name: PoliticalEntity
classes.label: Political Entity
classes.description: An entity that has political significance.
